title: artemisia ludoviciana subsp. incompta
intro: Artemisia ludoviciana subsp. incompta, also known as Silver King or White Sage, is a perennial herb native to North America. It belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Silver King include relief from digestive issues, skin irritations, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce stress and promote relaxation. Traditionally, Silver King is used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used externally to soothe wounds and skin conditions or internally to support overall well-being.
